name: Documents
property_value: The Documents collection for the current AutoCAD session.

name: SaveAs
description: Saves the document to a specified file; no longer supported for menu groups.

name: Layers
description: Gets the Layers collection for the document.
property_value: The Layers collection for the document.

name: ModelSpace
description: Gets the ModelSpace collection for the document.
property_value: The ModelSpace collection for the document.

name: Add
description: Creates a member object and adds it to the appropriate collection.

name: Add
description: Creates a member object and adds it to the appropriate collection.

name: AddLine
description: Creates a line passing through two points.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the line start point.
parameters.name: StartPoint

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the line endpoint.
parameters.name: EndPoint

name: AddPoint
description: Creates a Point object at a given location.

parameters.description: The coordinates of the point to be created.
parameters.name: Point

name: AddCircle
description: Creates a circle given a center point and radius.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the circle's center.
parameters.name: Center

parameters.description: The radius of the circle. Must be a positive number.
parameters.name: Radius

name: AddArc
description: Creates an arc given the center, radius, start angle, and end angle of the arc.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point of the arc.
parameters.name: Center

parameters.description: The start and end angles, in radians, defining the arc. A start angle greater than an end angle defines a counterclockwise arc.
parameters.name: StartAngle, EndAngle
